title: Battlefield™ 2042
description:
BATTLEFIELD HAZARD ZONE

A tense, squad-focused survival experience, Battlefield Hazard Zone combines edge-of-your-seat gameplay with the best of the Battlefield sandbox. Inserted as a four-member squad, you must locate and retrieve critical Data Drives, while competing against opposing squads. Every bullet, every skirmish, and every decision counts.

This game includes optional in-game purchases of virtual currency that can be used to acquire virtual in-game items.
